summary: Iteration 61 - Testing system settings tab, dark maps, driver login with phone/PIN, and add driver form. All features working correctly.

details: System Settings tab (إعدادات النظام) found in Settings page
Country settings (بلد النظام) - dropdown with Iraq, Saudi Arabia, UAE, etc.
Currency settings (عملة النظام الرئيسية) - dropdown with IQD, USD, SAR, etc.
Language settings (لغة النظام) - dropdown with Arabic, English
Save button (حفظ إعدادات النظام) present
Settings are saved and retrieved correctly via API
GET /api/system/currencies - Returns 8 currencies with name, symbol, rate_to_usd
GET /api/system/languages - Returns languages with name, dir (direction)
GET /api/system/countries - Returns countries with name, currency, language
GET /api/tenant/regional-settings - Returns current tenant settings
PUT /api/tenant/regional-settings - Saves and persists settings
DriverApp.js uses CARTO dark tiles (basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all)
CustomerMenu.js uses CARTO dark tiles (basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all)
Maps have dark theme similar to Waze
Driver location marker with blue gradient
Delivery location marker with red gradient
Driver App login page has phone input (رقم الهاتف)
Driver App login page has PIN input (الرمز السري PIN)
Login with correct credentials (07901234567, 1234) successful
Login shows welcome message (مرحباً سائق تجريبي!)
Wrong PIN returns 401 error
Unknown phone returns 404 error
Missing PIN returns 422 error
Add Driver dialog (إضافة سائق جديد) opens correctly
Form has Name field (اسم السائق)
Form has Phone field (رقم الهاتف)
Form has PIN field (الرمز السري PIN)
Helper text explains PIN usage (يستخدم السائق هذا الرمز لتسجيل الدخول)
No extra fields like email or address
Driver creation with PIN works correctly
12 tests passed
System currencies/languages/countries APIs work
Regional settings GET/PUT work
Driver login with phone/PIN works
Driver creation with name+phone+PIN works
CARTO dark tiles verified in code

context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working correctly: 1) System Settings tab with country/currency/language settings in a separate tab, 2) Dark maps using CARTO dark tiles in DriverApp and CustomerMenu, 3) Driver login with phone and PIN, 4) Add driver form with only name+phone+PIN fields.
